Care shall be taken that brackish or salt water is not used for this purpose. viii) All insulation shall conform to the qua lity requirements laid down below and test certificates on samples from the lot to be supplied shall be furnished to the Purchaser for approval. ix) The use of asbestos in any form for insulation and elsewhere is not permitted. x) The thermal conductivity of the insulating material to be considered for the design of thickness of insulation shall be the maxi mum value as per the relevant standard to which the material belongs.
